ruleset.name: Naming Rules
ruleset.description: The Naming Ruleset contains a collection of rules about names - too long, too short, and so forth.

rule.name: ShortClassName
rule.message: Avoid classes with short names like {0}. Configured minimum length is {1}.
rule.description: Detects when classes or interfaces have a very short name.

property.name: minimum
property.description: The class name length reporting threshold

property.name: exceptions
property.description: Comma-separated list of exceptions. Example: Log,URL,FTP

rule.name: LongClassName
rule.message: Avoid excessively long class names like {0}. Keep class name length under {1}.
rule.description: Detects when classes or interfaces are declared with excessively long names.

property.name: maximum
property.description: The class name length reporting threshold

property.name: subtract-prefixes
property.description: Comma-separated list of prefixes that will not count in the length of the class name. Only the first matching prefix will be subtracted.

property.name: subtract-suffixes
property.description: Comma-separated list of suffixes that will not count in the length of the class name. Only the first matching suffix will be subtracted.

rule.name: ShortVariable
rule.message: Avoid variables with short names like {0}. Configured minimum length is {1}.
rule.description: Detects when a field, local, or parameter has a very short name.

property.name: minimum
property.description: Minimum length for a variable, property or parameter name

rule.name: LongVariable
rule.message: Avoid excessively long variable names like {0}. Keep variable name length under {1}.
rule.description: Detects when a field, formal or local variable is declared with a long name.

property.name: subtract-prefixes
property.description: Comma-separated list of prefixes that will not count in the length of the variable name. Only the first matching prefix will be subtracted.

property.name: subtract-suffixes
property.description: Comma-separated list of suffixes that will not count in the length of the variable name. Only the first matching suffix will be subtracted.

rule.name: ShortMethodName
rule.message: Avoid using short method names like {0}::{1}(). The configured minimum method name length is {2}.
rule.description: Detects when very short method names are used.

property.name: minimum
property.description: Minimum length for a method or function name

rule.name: ConstantNamingConventions
rule.message: Constant {0} should be defined in PascalCase
rule.description: Class/interface constant names should follow the configured naming convention. The default convention is PascalCase (C# idiomatic). Set convention=upper for ALL_CAPS (UPPER_CASE) style as used in phpmd/Java.

property.name: convention
property.description: Naming convention: pascal (default, PascalCase) or upper (ALL_CAPS)

rule.name: BooleanGetMethodName
rule.message: The '{0}()' method which returns a boolean should be named 'Is...()' or 'Has...()'
rule.description: Looks for methods named 'GetX()' with 'bool' as the return type. The convention in C# is to name these methods 'IsX()' or 'HasX()'.

property.name: checkParameterizedMethods
property.description: Applies only to methods without parameters when set to true
